name: Sauteed Spinach and Red Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Seed bell peppers and cut into strips. Do not dry the spinach.
2. In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
3. Add the bell peppers, garlic, and crushed red pepper flakes to the skillet. Stir frequently for 3-4 minutes until the peppers are softened.
4. Add the steamed rinsed spinach to the skillet. Sprinkle with salt. Increase the heat to medium-high and cook, stirring occasionally, for an additional 3 minutes or until the vegetables are tender.
Each half cup serving provides: 1/2 fat and 2 vitamins.
